notes: E11 spans three stories: E11.1 (backend, not tested here), E11.2 (Task UI — My Tasks page, Create Dialog, Detail Sheet, Task Panel, Dashboard Tasks Today card), and E11.3 (Task Notifications — backend, not tested here). All frontend tests target the tenant web app at :5110. Auth uses standard JWT (STAFF+ role required for /tasks). Design follows Concept D with purple #7c3aed primary, #f4f2ff background. Key UI components: MyTasksPage (T1 Entity List), TaskDetailSheet (480px right sheet), CreateTaskDialog (560px dialog), TaskPanel (embedded in record detail pages), TasksCard (dashboard bottom card). Status cycling: OPEN -> IN_PROGRESS -> COMPLETED. Terminal states (COMPLETED, CANCELLED) block further changes.

journeys.name: Journey 1: My Tasks Page Shell & Navigation
journeys.description: Verify the My Tasks page loads correctly with breadcrumb, status tabs, search, priority filter, and sidebar nav entry

steps.expected_result: My Tasks page loads with full T1 Entity List template
steps.visual_check: Page shows CheckSquare icon + 'My Tasks' breadcrumb and h1 title, purple '+ Create Task' button top-right, 4 status chip tabs (All, Open, In Progress, Overdue) with counts, search input with magnifying glass icon, Priority dropdown filter, #f4f2ff background, animate-fade-in-up animations

steps.expected_result: My Tasks nav item visible in sidebar with CheckSquare icon in the Main section
Four chip tabs visible: All (count), Open (count), In Progress (count), Overdue (count). 'All' tab active with purple bg-[#7c3aed] and white text
Table visible with headers: checkbox, status icon col, Task, Priority, Status, Due, Record, Assignees. Table has rounded-xl border, bg-card, custom shadow

journeys.name: Journey 2: Create a New Task (Basic)
journeys.description: Test creating a task with title, priority, and due date via the Create Task dialog

steps.expected_result: My Tasks page loads
Create Task dialog opens with animate-step-in animation
steps.visual_check: Dialog visible with 'Create Task' title (serif font), fields: Title (required, marked with red asterisk), Description (textarea), Priority (Select, default Normal), Due Date (calendar button), Assignees (UserMultiSelect), Linked Record. Two action buttons: 'Create & Add Another' (outline) and 'Create' (purple). Dialog max-w 560px

input_data.title: Follow up with Acme Ltd on invoice payment

steps.expected_result: Form fields populated with entered values
Task created, dialog closes, success toast appears, task list refreshes
steps.visual_check: Dialog dismissed, task list shows new task 'Follow up with Acme Ltd on invoice payment' with HIGH priority badge (red outline), due date shown as '10 Mar 2026', success toast visible

journeys.name: Journey 3: Create Task Form Validation
journeys.description: Test that title is required and the form shows validation errors

steps.expected_result: My Tasks page loads
Create Task dialog opens
Validation error shown, dialog remains open
steps.visual_check: Red error text visible below Title field indicating title is required, dialog still open, Create button not loading

journeys.name: Journey 4: Create Task & Add Another
journeys.description: Test the 'Create & Add Another' flow that creates a task and keeps the dialog open with cleared fields

steps.expected_result: My Tasks page loads
Create Task dialog opens
Title field populated
Task created, dialog stays open, fields cleared for next entry
steps.visual_check: Dialog still open, Title field empty (cleared), Priority reset to Normal, success toast visible for first task creation

steps.expected_result: Title field populated with second task
Second task created, dialog closes
steps.visual_check: Dialog dismissed, task list shows both 'First task - review report' and 'Second task - send email'

journeys.name: Journey 5: Open Task Detail Sheet
journeys.description: Test clicking a task row to open the detail sheet with full task info

steps.expected_result: My Tasks page loads with tasks visible

steps.target: First task row in the table (non-checkbox, non-status-icon area)
steps.expected_result: Task Detail Sheet slides in from the right
steps.visual_check: 480px Sheet visible from right with: 'Task Details' header (serif font), task title (editable with pencil icon), Status section with action buttons (Start/Complete/Cancel for OPEN tasks), Description section (editable), Priority Select, Due Date with calendar picker, Assignees list with avatars and remove (X) buttons, '+ Add' assignee button, Linked Record section (if entity linked), Activity timeline showing created date, Footer with 'Delete Task' red button

steps.target: Activity timeline section in detail sheet
steps.expected_result: Timeline shows at least 'Task created' entry with date, purple dot indicators connected by vertical line

journeys.name: Journey 6: Status Cycling via Table Icon Click
journeys.description: Test clicking the status icon in the table to cycle OPEN -> IN_PROGRESS -> COMPLETED

steps.expected_result: My Tasks page loads

steps.target: Status icon (grey Circle) of an OPEN task row
steps.expected_result: Task status changes to IN_PROGRESS, icon becomes blue CircleDot
steps.visual_check: Status icon changed from grey Circle to blue CircleDot, status label column shows 'In Progress' in blue text, toast confirming status update

steps.target: Status icon (blue CircleDot) of the same now-IN_PROGRESS task
steps.expected_result: Task status changes to COMPLETED, icon becomes green CheckCircle2
steps.visual_check: Status icon changed to green CheckCircle2, task title shows line-through text in muted foreground, status label shows 'Completed' in green text

steps.target: Status icon (green CheckCircle2) of the now-COMPLETED task
steps.expected_result: No change — COMPLETED is a terminal state, icon is disabled (opacity-70), no further cycling

journeys.name: Journey 7: Status Actions in Task Detail Sheet
journeys.description: Test status transition buttons in the detail sheet for OPEN and IN_PROGRESS tasks

steps.expected_result: My Tasks page loads

steps.target: An OPEN task row to open detail sheet
steps.expected_result: Detail sheet opens showing status section
steps.visual_check: Status section shows 'Status: Open', three buttons visible: 'Start' (blue), 'Complete' (outline with green hover), 'Cancel' (outline with red hover)

steps.expected_result: Status changes to IN_PROGRESS, buttons update
steps.visual_check: Status section now shows 'Status: In Progress', two buttons remain: 'Complete' and 'Cancel'. Start button is gone.

steps.expected_result: Status changes to COMPLETED, buttons replaced with completion text
steps.visual_check: Status section shows green text 'Completed on [date]' with checkmark icon, no action buttons, title shows line-through, priority and due date are read-only (no Select/Calendar pickers)

journeys.name: Journey 8: Inline Edit Title & Description in Detail Sheet
journeys.description: Test inline editing of task title and description in the detail sheet

steps.expected_result: My Tasks page loads

steps.target: An active (OPEN or IN_PROGRESS) task row
steps.expected_result: Detail sheet opens

steps.target: Pencil icon next to task title
steps.expected_result: Title becomes editable Input field, auto-focused and selected

input_data.title: Updated task title via inline edit

steps.expected_result: Title input shows new text

steps.target: Press Enter or blur the title input
steps.expected_result: Title saved, input reverts to text display
steps.visual_check: Title displays as 'Updated task title via inline edit' in semibold text, pencil icon reappears, toast confirming update

steps.target: Pencil icon next to Description section
steps.expected_result: Description becomes editable textarea with Save/Cancel buttons

input_data.description: Updated description text for this task

steps.expected_result: Textarea shows new text
Description saved, textarea reverts to text display
steps.visual_check: Description shows 'Updated description text for this task' as plain text, pencil icon reappears

journeys.name: Journey 9: Status Tab Filtering
journeys.description: Test the status chip tabs filter tasks correctly

steps.expected_result: My Tasks page loads with All tab active, showing all tasks
Table filters to show only OPEN tasks
steps.visual_check: Open tab has purple bg, All tab is secondary/grey. Table rows only show tasks with grey Circle status icons and 'Open' status labels

steps.expected_result: Table filters to show only IN_PROGRESS tasks
steps.visual_check: In Progress tab has purple bg. Table rows show blue CircleDot icons and 'In Progress' labels

steps.expected_result: Table filters to show only overdue tasks (dueDate < today, status OPEN or IN_PROGRESS)
steps.visual_check: Overdue tab has purple bg. Table rows show tasks with red due dates and TaskOverdueBadge (AlertTriangle + 'Overdue Xd' in red)

steps.expected_result: All tasks shown again, All tab active

journeys.name: Journey 10: Search and Priority Filter
journeys.description: Test search input and priority dropdown filtering

steps.expected_result: My Tasks page loads with all tasks
Task list filters to tasks containing 'invoice' in title
steps.visual_check: Search input shows 'invoice', task table shows only tasks with 'invoice' in their title, tab counts updated

steps.expected_result: All tasks shown again
Priority dropdown opens showing: All Priorities, Urgent, High, Normal, Low
Task list filters to HIGH priority tasks only
steps.visual_check: Priority filter shows 'High', table shows only tasks with red-outline HIGH priority badges

journeys.name: Journey 11: Batch Selection and Actions
journeys.description: Test selecting multiple tasks and using batch Complete All and Cancel actions

steps.expected_result: My Tasks page loads
Task selected, batch action bar appears
Two tasks selected, batch bar updates count
steps.visual_check: Batch action bar visible with purple border, shows '2 selected', four buttons: 'Complete All' (green), 'Reassign...' (outline), 'Cancel' (outline with X icon), 'Clear' (ghost). Bar has animate-slide-in animation, bg-[#f5f3ff]

steps.target: Complete All button (green) in batch bar
steps.expected_result: All selected tasks marked as COMPLETED, batch bar disappears, selection cleared
steps.visual_check: Both tasks now show green CheckCircle2 icons, line-through titles, 'Completed' status labels, batch bar gone

journeys.name: Journey 12: Batch Select All via Header Checkbox
journeys.description: Test the select-all checkbox in the table header and Clear button

steps.expected_result: My Tasks page loads with tasks
All visible tasks selected, batch action bar shows total count
steps.visual_check: All row checkboxes checked with purple bg-[#7c3aed], batch bar shows 'N selected' matching visible task count

steps.target: Clear button in batch action bar
steps.expected_result: All selections cleared, batch bar disappears

journeys.name: Journey 13: Manage Assignees in Detail Sheet
journeys.description: Test adding and removing assignees in the task detail sheet

steps.expected_result: My Tasks page loads

steps.target: An active task row to open detail sheet
steps.expected_result: Detail sheet opens
Assignees section visible with header label, list of current assignees (avatar circles with initials in purple bg-[#ede9fe]), remove X buttons, and '+ Add' button

steps.target: + Add assignee button (purple text with Plus icon)
steps.expected_result: UserMultiSelect popover opens for searching and selecting users
steps.visual_check: Popover appears below the Add button with UserMultiSelect combobox, search input visible for finding users

steps.target: X (remove) button on an existing assignee row
steps.expected_result: Assignee removed from the list

journeys.name: Journey 14: Delete Task from Detail Sheet
journeys.description: Test deleting a task via the detail sheet footer with AlertDialog confirmation

steps.expected_result: My Tasks page loads

steps.target: A task row to open detail sheet
steps.expected_result: Detail sheet opens

steps.target: Delete Task button (red text with Trash2 icon, bottom-right of sheet footer)
steps.expected_result: AlertDialog confirmation opens
steps.visual_check: AlertDialog overlay with 'Delete Task' title, confirmation message 'Are you sure you want to delete this task?', Cancel and Delete buttons (Delete in red bg-[#ef4444])

steps.expected_result: Task deleted, sheet closes, task removed from list
steps.visual_check: Sheet dismissed, task no longer visible in the task table, success toast 'Task deleted' visible

journeys.name: Journey 15: Task Panel on Invoice Detail Page
journeys.description: Test the embedded TaskPanel component on a record detail page (invoice)

steps.expected_result: Invoice list page loads

steps.target: First invoice row to open detail page
steps.expected_result: Invoice detail page loads

steps.target: TaskPanel card component on the detail page
steps.expected_result: TaskPanel visible with CheckSquare icon, 'Tasks (N)' header, '+ Add Task' button
steps.visual_check: TaskPanel card with 12px radius, custom shadow, purple hover shadow. Header shows CheckSquare icon + 'Tasks (N)' count + '+ Add Task' outline button. Either shows active task items or empty state with 'No tasks for this record' message and '+ Add Task' CTA

steps.target: + Add Task button in TaskPanel header
steps.expected_result: CreateTaskDialog opens with entity pre-filled
steps.visual_check: Create Task dialog open, Linked Record field shows read-only EntityLinkChip with entity type icon and invoice identifier (e.g. 'Invoice INV-2026-XXXX'), purple border chip, non-editable

steps.target: Create Task form in panel context
steps.expected_result: Title populated
Task created with entity link, dialog closes, TaskPanel refreshes
steps.visual_check: TaskPanel now shows the new task 'Chase payment for this invoice' as a TaskPanelItem with status icon, title, priority badge

journeys.name: Journey 16: Task Panel Item Interactions
journeys.description: Test TaskPanelItem status cycling, quick actions, and opening PanelDetailSheet

steps.expected_result: Invoice list loads

steps.target: Invoice with tasks linked to open detail page
steps.expected_result: Invoice detail page loads with TaskPanel showing active tasks
Panel item shows: clickable status icon, task title, priority badge, secondary row with assignee names and due date, quick action buttons (Start/Complete)
steps.visual_check: TaskPanelItem in rounded-lg border card with: status Circle icon (clickable), title text, priority badge inline. Secondary row with assignee names and due date. Quick action buttons: 'Start' (outline, blue hover) and 'Complete' (outline, green hover) with h-6 height, text-[10px]

steps.target: Complete quick action button on a TaskPanelItem
steps.expected_result: Task status changes to COMPLETED, item styling changes
steps.visual_check: Task title now has line-through and muted text, status icon is green CheckCircle2, quick action buttons removed, secondary row shows 'Completed' with completion date

steps.target: Task item body area (non-button) of another active task
steps.expected_result: PanelDetailSheet opens from right with task details
steps.visual_check: 480px Sheet from right showing task title, status actions, description, priority, due date, assignees, linked record (entity chip), and delete button

journeys.name: Journey 17: Task Panel Completed/Cancelled Section Toggle
journeys.description: Test the collapsible completed/cancelled section in TaskPanel

steps.expected_result: Invoice list loads

steps.target: Invoice with completed tasks to open detail page
steps.expected_result: Invoice detail page loads, TaskPanel visible with completed tasks section
'Completed (N)' toggle visible with ChevronDown icon, collapsed by default
Completed/Cancelled tasks section expands showing completed task items
steps.visual_check: Toggle shows ChevronUp icon, completed tasks visible below with line-through titles, green CheckCircle2 or grey XCircle icons, muted text styling

journeys.name: Journey 18: Dashboard Tasks Today Card
journeys.description: Test the Tasks Today card on the briefing dashboard shows today's and overdue tasks

steps.expected_result: Dashboard loads with bottom cards section
steps.visual_check: Dashboard visible with bottom cards area containing TasksCard. TasksCard shows: CheckSquare icon with 'Tasks Today' header, list of tasks due today or overdue (max 4), each with clickable TaskStatusIcon, task title, TaskPriorityBadge. Or empty state: 'No tasks due today - you're all clear!' if none due

steps.expected_result: Card shows tasks with interactive status icons (clickable for cycling), priority badges, and 'View all tasks' link at bottom

steps.target: 'View all tasks' link (ArrowRight icon) at bottom of TasksCard
steps.expected_result: Navigates to /tasks (My Tasks page)
steps.visual_check: My Tasks page loaded with full task list

journeys.name: Journey 19: Dashboard Task Status Toggle
journeys.description: Test cycling task status directly from the Dashboard Tasks Today card

steps.expected_result: Dashboard loads with Tasks Today card showing active tasks

steps.target: Status icon of an OPEN task in the Tasks Today card
steps.expected_result: Task status cycles to IN_PROGRESS, icon changes to blue CircleDot
steps.visual_check: Task in Tasks Today card now shows blue CircleDot icon instead of grey Circle, status change reflected immediately

journeys.name: Journey 20: Responsive Mobile Card Layout
journeys.description: Test that phone viewport shows card layout instead of table for tasks

steps.expected_result: My Tasks page loads in mobile viewport
steps.visual_check: Task table hidden (sm:block), card layout visible (sm:hidden). Each task shown as a rounded-xl card with: status icon + title row, priority badge + status label + due date inline, entity link below (if linked), checkbox top-right. Cards have 12px radius, custom shadow, purple hover shadow. Header stacks vertically (flex-col)

steps.target: A task card in mobile layout
steps.expected_result: TaskDetailSheet opens from right
steps.visual_check: Sheet takes full width on mobile (w-full), same content as desktop sheet: title, status actions, details, assignees, linked record

steps.target: Status icon on a mobile task card (stopPropagation area)
steps.expected_result: Status cycles without opening the detail sheet
